zh.Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯托克 打馬字
zh.lifeSummary: Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford於1047年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可。她於大約1068年與Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯托克 打馬字結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1080年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯托克 打馬字享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saint-Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Haitian: variant of Saint-Jean (see St. Jean ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. This form of the surname is very rare in France; it is more common in Haiti.

variants.name: St. Jean
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Adelard, Andre, Jacques, Marcel, Jean Claude, Micheline, Normand, Aldor, Antoine, Benoit, Chanel.

French (mainly southwestern; Saint-Jean): habitational name from any of several places in various parts of France named Saint-Jean (from the dedication of their churches to Saint John), or a nickname with the prefix Saint as an (ironic) attachment to the personal name or surname Jean ; this was one of the most common nicknames (noms de guerre) among French soldiers (see Lafleur ). Compare Saintjean .

Haitian (also Saint-Jean): from Saint-Jean, a nickname, ornamental name, or personal name composed of the French prefix Saint and the personal name Jean , or perhaps a habitational name from a place in Haiti called Saint-Jean (compare 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford was born in 1047, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache about 1068, in Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1080, in Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford est née en 1047, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache environ 1068, à Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1080, à Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

ja.Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストク タルマッジ
ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samfordは1047年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた。約1068年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストク タルマッジでLord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemacheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1080年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストク タルマッジで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford(은)는 1047년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1068년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스토크 탤마지에서 Lord Todmag Hundred Samford de tallemache(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1080년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스토크 탤마지에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Baroness Agnes de Saint-Jean of Samford родилась в 1047 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
